channel.title: NullShift Blog
channel.description: Technical deep-dives on privacy, AI, blockchain, and zero-knowledge proofs from NullShift Labs.

item.title: The Future of On-Device AI: Why the Cloud is the Enemy
item.description: Every API call is a privacy leak. On-device inference isn't just about latency — it's about sovereignty over your own computation.

item.title: Why Privacy Matters in the Age of Surveillance Capitalism
item.description: Your data is the product. Your attention is the currency. Here's why building privacy-first tools isn't optional — it's survival.

item.title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs: Proving Everything, Revealing Nothing
item.description: A technical deep-dive into how ZK proofs work, why they matter for blockchain privacy, and how we're using them at NullShift.

item.title: Mixer Networks and the War on Metadata
item.description: Encryption protects content. Mixnets protect context. Why metadata resistance is the next frontier in privacy engineering.

item.title: Autonomous AI Agents in DeFi: Architecture of Our Trading System
item.description: How we built a multi-agent system that monitors markets, executes trades, and manages risk — all without human intervention.

item.title: The Case for Decentralized Identity on Blockchain
item.description: Why centralized identity systems are broken, and how blockchain-based self-sovereign identity can fix the internet's trust problem.

item.title: Smart Contract Security: Lessons from $3B in DeFi Exploits
item.description: Every major DeFi exploit shares common patterns. Here's what we've learned from auditing contracts and how to build defensively.
